summary: Worked on a web-based platform used by tax officers to manage taxpayer records, audits, document verification, and operational workflows.
objective: Improve efficiency, standardize operational processes, and enable tax officers to manage taxpayer-related activities through a centralized platform.
challenge: The platform involved multiple stakeholder groups with evolving requirements. Business workflows needed to be accurately translated into technical requirements while supporting audits, document approvals, and taxpayer record management.
actions: Conducted requirement gathering sessions with business stakeholders
Mapped end-to-end workflows for taxpayer management and audit processes
Created user stories and acceptance criteria for development teams
Collaborated with developers and QA teams throughout sprint execution
Managed stakeholder communication and requirement clarifications
Supported sprint planning, backlog refinement, and prioritization discussions
Participated in UAT activities and validated implemented functionality against business requirements
Supported end-to-end implementation activities from requirement gathering through deployment
outcome: Enabled successful implementation of workflow enhancements, improved requirement clarity across teams, and supported efficient management of taxpayer records, audits, and document approval workflows.

summary: Worked with healthtech organizations to explore partnerships, integrations, and white-label opportunities for Fitrofy's health platform.
objective: Expand product reach through strategic partnerships and integration opportunities.
challenge: Different organizations had unique business requirements, integration expectations, and product needs.
actions: Worked with internal teams on integration discussions
outcome: Helped identify partnership opportunities and supported discussions around product integrations and white-label solutions.

summary: Built an AI-powered recruiter assistant that acts as a digital representation of my professional experience.
objective: Help recruiters understand experience, projects, and product thinking through conversational AI.
challenge: Creating grounded AI responses instead of generic chatbot answers.
outcome: Built a portfolio-grade AI product demonstrating product thinking and AI workflow design.
